sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Find purple square (20 pixels) and key objects
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20 or n['color'] == 'M' or n['color'] == 'G' or (n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12):
        print(f"AFTER: {n['color']} id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos={n['boundary'][0]}")

print("\n--- Before this click ---")
for n in before['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20 or n['color'] == 'M' or n['color'] == 'G' or (n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12):
        print(f"BEFORE: {n['color']} id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos={n['boundary'][0]}")

# Check trail endpoints
print("\nTrail (w color) after:")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'w':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos={n['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
